modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to add equipment and areas to TMA and PM schedule.

full_description_text: The user is trying to update work orders in the TMA application. They need to add leased Toro Utility Carts and make changes to the Dakota Dome Interior Renovation Areas. There are also requests to add a new machine to the TMA system.
short_description: Need to add equipment and areas to TMA and PM schedule.
description: The user is trying to update work orders in the TMA application. They need to add leased Toro Utility Carts and make changes to the Dakota Dome Interior Renovation Areas. There are also requests to add a new machine to the TMA system.
